message:
docs: update total test count to 2,016 in FEATURE_PARITY.md

Reflects additional test coverage from datetime differential cases
and other recent conformance additions (was 2,004).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
